LanguageData.BEWH.Votann.ModSettings.KinContractMinVa: Minimum value of items that Kin will want to trade.
Too low value can cause slow downs when refreshing contracts.
LanguageData.BEWH.Votann.Kin.CrucibleGrowDesc: Start the process to grow a new Kin
LanguageData.BEWH.Votann.Contract.Title: Kin Contracts
LanguageData.BEWH.Votann.Contract.GoodwillTooltip: Goodwill is the general show of much the kin like and affects other aspects. It goes from 0-100 with -100 being reserved for hostility.
LanguageData.BEWH.Votann.Contract.PriceMultTooltip: This is the price multipler on the things they'll trade you. over 1 being in your favor and below being in theirs. Scales of goodwill
LanguageData.BEWH.Votann.Contract.MaximumContractsToo: Maximum amount of offered contracts. Scales of goodwill
LanguageData.BEWH.Votann.Contract.ItemNotReceived: You didn't send the requested item in time and have angered the Kin, they will soon send a "reclaiming" party to get what is theirs and settle their grudge.
LanguageData.BEWH.Votann.Contract.ItemReceivedMessage: Kin have sent {0} as their part of the deal. They're waiting for you to send back the agreed upon item via transport pods
LanguageData.BEWH.Votann.PlacementLimit.RequiresKin: Requires a colonist with the 'Cloneskein' gene on the map to place.
